contentPattern.structure: icon + level heading + description + CTA link (repeating items)

suitableFor: escalation / contact-level grids (Level 1/2/3 with icon, heading, description, link)
icon-led help or support card rows with a call-to-action link
3-up contact/redressal cards on a grey or light section
notSuitableFor: text-only service cards without icons (use cards-service)
compact icon+label navigation tiles with no description (use cards-icon-tile)
